/AJW/CH2 SP 2 Y L/DEF TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 364 DAYS COUNTY JIL, 364 SAGE FOR ATOTAL OF 728  DAYS,/WEAP/X: THE TEN YEAR PROTECTIVE ORDER REMAINS IN PLACE AND WILL EXPIRE ON 02-01-28,/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT IS TO PAY RETITUTION TO THE VICTIM AS PER EITHER APD OR PAROLE/DNACOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CTORD: THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON COUNT 14/CCC: COUNTS TWO AND FOURTEEN/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC1170(A)(3)/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION WITHIN TWO BUSINESS DAYS OF HIS RELEASE TO DETERMINE ELIGIBILITY FOR POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION/CTORD: IF THE DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION, HE MUST REPORT TO PAROLE IMMEDIATELY/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE: 01-03-18/PAR70/DISM3/
/CAL: TO SET SENTENCE/X: THE COURT APPOINTS CONFLICT COUNSEL GREG GOLDMANTO ADVISE THE DEFENDANT AS TO WHETHER OR NOT TO WITHDRAW HIS PLEAS,/CONTD:TO SET HEARING RE WITHDRAWL OF PLEA/DOP/

/CAL  PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE PEOPE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT,/FAWC/IRRC/WITEXCL/INVOFF: JOHN KEANE,SFPD INVESTIGATOR/WIT SWORN: FLOR A   /EXHMA: P-1, COLOR PHOTO OF VICTIM'S LEG AND FOOT, P-2, PHOTO OF VICTIM SHOWING HER LEFT PALM, P-3, CLOSE-UP PHOTO OF VICTIM'S PALM OF LEFT HAND, P-4,CD RECORDING OF PHONE CALLS MADE BYDEFENDANT, P-5 AND P-6, TWO COLOR PHOTOS OF FLIP PHONES SHOWING TEXT MESSAGES, P-7, A GROUP OF SIX PHOTOS SHOWING A FLIP PHONE AND THE MESSAGES ON THE SCREEN/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADVRTS: 2, 14/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 02-26-18/SA2: FLOR A/SA2: 247 FARALLONE ST, SF/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/X: THE STAY AWAY ORDER IS A TEN YEAR ORDER WITH EXPIRATION DATE OF 02-01-28,/ARBUCKLE/PPRFCUST/CONTD: PSRAND SENTENCE, DISMISS ALL OTHER CHARGES/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING; DA MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SMOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CTORD:SFPD OFFICER DANIEL OWENS MUST RETURN TO COURT ON 02-01-18/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DA MOTION TO AMENDCOMPLAINT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/BAIL:500,000/NTW/LDPX:01-19-18/SA1:FLOR A,/SA2:247 FARALLONES ST,,S,F, CA/SAORD/TE:A HALF DAY FOR HEARING/CONTD:D20 TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
